samples.gvd:
module fsm
(
    input IN,
    input CLK,
    input RST,
    output reg MATCH
);

reg [2:0] state, next_state;

parameter S0 = 3'b000, S1 = 3'b001, S2 = 3'b010, S3 = 3'b011, S4 = 3'b100, S5 = 3'b101;

always @(posedge CLK or posedge RST) begin
    if (RST) begin
        state <= S0;
        MATCH <= 1'b0;
    end
    else begin
        state <= next_state;
        case (state)
            S0: begin
                if (IN) begin
                    next_state <= S1;
                end
                else begin
                    next_state <= S0;
                end
            end
            S1: begin
                if (IN) begin
                    next_state <= S1;
                end
                else begin
                    next_state <= S2;
                end
            end
            S2: begin
                if (IN) begin
                    next_state <= S1;
                end
                else begin
                    next_state <= S3;
                end
            end
            S3: begin
                if (IN) begin
                    next_state <= S4;
                end
                else begin
                    next_state <= S0;
                end
            end
            S4: begin
                if (IN) begin
                    next_state <= S5;
                end
                else begin
                    next_state <= S2;
                end
            end
            S5: begin
                if (IN) begin
                    next_state <= S1;
                    MATCH <= 1'b1;
                end
                else begin
                    next_state <= S0;
                    MATCH <= 1'b0;
                end
            end
            default: begin
                next_state <= S0;
            end
        endcase
    end
end

endmodule
samples.xml_description:
<module id="fsm">
    <description>Implement a Mealy FSM detection circuit that detects a single-bit input IN. When the input is 10011, output MATCH is 1, and MATCH is 0 in other cases. Support for continuous input and loop detection.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="IN">Input signal to the FSM.</input>
        <input id="CLK">Clock signal used for synchronous operation.</input>
        <input id="RST">Reset signal to initialize the FSM.</input>
        <output id="MATCH">Output signal indicating a match condition based on the FSM state.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <parameter id="S0">Initial state of the FSM.</parameter>
        <parameter id="S1">State of the FSM when the input is 1.</parameter>
        <parameter id="S2">State of the FSM when the input is 0.</parameter>
        <parameter id="S3">State of the FSM when the input is 1.</parameter>
        <parameter id="S4">State of the FSM when the input is 1.</parameter>
        <parameter id="S5">State of the FSM when the input is 0.</parameter>
        <parameter id="S6">State of the FSM when the input is 0.</parameter>
        <parameter id="S7">State of the FSM when the input is 1.</parameter>
        <parameter id="S8">State of the FSM when the input is 1.</parameter>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <reg id="state" type="sequential_logic">Current state of the FSM.</reg>
        <reg id="next_state" type="sequential_logic">Next state of the FSM.</reg>
        <reg id="match_reg" type="sequential_logic">Register to store the MATCH output.</reg>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        <sequential_logic>
            <always description="Sequential logic block triggered on the positive edge of CLK or the negative edge of RST">
                <if description="Reset condition">
                    <condition description="RST is active">
                        <true>
                            <assign description="Reset MATCH_REG to 0" expression="match_reg = 0" />
                            <assign description="Reset state to S0" expression="state = S0" />
                        </true>
                    </condition>
                </if>
                <else description="If not in reset state">
                    <condition description="CLK is active">
                        <true>
                            <assign description="Update state to next_state" expression="state = next_state" />
                        </true>
                    </condition>
                </else>
            </always>
        </sequential_logic>
        <combinational_logic>
            <always description="Combinational logic block triggered on the change of IN or state">
                <if description="Input IN is 1">
                    <condition expression="IN == 1'b1">
                        <true>
                            <assign description="Update next_state based on current state" expression="next_state = (state == S0) ? S1 : (state == S1) ? S1 : (state == S2) ? S3 : (state == S3) ? S4 : (state == S4) ? S5 : (state == S5) ? S6 : (state == S6) ? S7 : (state == S7) ? S8 : (state == S8) ? S0 : S0" />
                        </true>
                    </condition>
                </if>
                <else description="Input IN is not 1">
                    <condition expression="IN == 1'b0">
                        <true>
                            <assign description="Update next_state based on current state" expression="next_state = (state == S0) ? S2 : (state == S1) ? S0 : (state == S2) ? S2 : (state == S3) ? S4 : (state == S4) ? S3 : (state == S5) ? S5 : (state == S6) ? S7 : (state == S7) ? S6 : (state == S8) ? S8 : (state == S0) ? S0 : S0" />
                        </true>
                    </condition>
                </else>
                <else description="Input IN is 0">
                    <condition expression="IN == 1'b0">
                        <true>
                            <assign description="Update MATCH_REG to 1" expression="match_reg = 1" />
                        </true>
                    </condition>
                </else>
            </always>
        </combinational_logic>
        <assign description="Assign MATCH_REG to MATCH output" expression="MATCH = match_reg" />
    </implementation>
</module>
